3315930.name: DCS: F-16C Arctic Thunder Campaign by Reflected Simulations
3315930.description:
February 2024. Finland is on the verge of joining NATO, when the unthinkable happens: Russian armed forces push through the border while cruise missiles rain down on the country. Several western allies join the conflict at once to fight alongside their Finnish brothers in arms. Among them is the 112th Fighter Squadron of the Air National Guard, who had just arrived from a training exercise in the UK. 

For the release of the DCS Kola map, Baltic Dragon and Reflected Simulations created a fictional scenario based on real life events and tactics. Fly a Viper with the legendary Stingers to defeat the invaders in Reflected Simulations’s version, or Strap into a Finnish Hornet and take off from a hidden road base in its twin campaign made by Baltic Dragon (These 2 campaigns are sold separately).

Take part in study level, highly realistic missions such as CAP, CAS, SEAD and precision strikes. Follow real life procedures down to unprecedented details. In two highly realistic campaigns woven into the same storyline, experience what it would be like to fly as a fighter pilot in a large-scale air war today.

Key Features:

  • 10 immersive story driven missions with a wide variety of tasks such as CAS, Strikes, CAP, SEAD and more

  • Study level simulation of real life USAF procedures

  • Thousands of custom voice overs

  • Real life ATC procedures

  • Realistic custom paint schemes

  • Extensive documentation and background story

  • Detailed briefings and flight plans

  • Authentic kneeboard pages

  • True to life F-16 checklists

  • Custom DCS UI backgrounds and music

Localization:

Voiceovers: English

Briefings/Subtitles: English

All required products

  • DCS: F-16C Viper

  • DCS: Kola map
3315930.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语*, 捷克语, 法语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
